cards.front: What is the main function of the Physical Layer in the OSI model?
cards.back: To define the physical means of data transmission between devices

cards.front: What type of media is used for data transmission in a local area network?
cards.back: Guided Media, such as coaxial cables and twisted pair cables

cards.front: What type of media is used for data transmission over long distances?
cards.back: Unguided Media, such as wireless signals and fiber optic cables

cards.front: Which protocol suite is widely used in the internet?
What is the 7-layered model used for in computer networks?
cards.back: To divide data into smaller parts and manage their transmission between devices
